name: @mambalabsdev/mcp-gtm-suite
description: MCP server for the full Mamba Labs GTM Suite. Exposes all eleven account-intelligence actors as tools in one server via Apify: identity resolution, firmographics, social presence, hiring signals, tech stack, job board scanner, funding and press, change feed, LinkedIn resolver, signal aggregator, and ICP scorer. Clay-ready output.
author: Mamba Labs <labs@mambamindsetgrowth.com>
